title: The Little Cloud's Big Dream
content:
High up in the bright blue sky, there floated a small white cloud named Cloudy. Cloudy drifted gently over fields and rivers all day. Far below, the flowers in the garden were drooping and dry, desperately needing water.

"I want to help them," Cloudy said softly. "But I am too small. I do not have enough rain yet." So Cloudy began to drift through the cool air, collecting tiny droplets of water. Slowly, slowly, Cloudy grew bigger and rounder.

At last Cloudy was full and round and heavy with rain. Cloudy floated down toward the garden. The flowers looked up with hopeful faces. Then, with a soft pitter-patter, the rain began to fall.

The flowers lifted their heads. The grass turned bright green. The birds splashed in the puddles with happy chirps. "Thank you, Cloudy!" whispered the flowers. Cloudy felt warm and happy inside. The sun came back out and painted a beautiful rainbow across the sky.

The flowers lifted their heads. The grass turned bright green. The birds splashed in the puddles with happy chirps. "Thank you, Cloudy!" whispered the flowers. Cloudy felt warm and happy inside. The sun came back out and painted a beautiful rainbow across the sky.
